# Reinvently

> Reinvently is a UK-based AI solutions consultancy helping organisations transform ideas into impactful AI solutions. Founded by Ed Yau (https://uk.linkedin.com/in/edmond-yau)

Reinvently works with MSPs and directly with enterprises across charities, public sector, utilties, financial services to identify, design and deploy AI applications that deliver measurable value. Services span AI strategy, solution architecture and training.

## Services

AI strategy and roadmapping, AI solution architecture, web development, AI training and implementation, enterprise AI adoption.
